query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750007, 'What does the grammatical-historical method seek to determine?', 'multiple_choice', '["Hidden spiritual meanings","What the text meant to its original audience","Modern applications only","Allegorical interpretations"]', 'What the text meant to its original audience', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'What does grammatical analysis examine?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only word definitions","Words, syntax, and structure of the text","Spiritual meanings","Reader responses"]', 'Words, syntax, and structure of the text', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'What is included in historical-cultural background study?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only the author''s biography","Author''s circumstances, audience situation, and cultural practices","Modern interpretations","Church tradition"]', 'Author''s circumstances, audience situation, and cultural practices', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'What principle states that Scripture interprets Scripture?', 'multiple_choice', '["Sola fide","Analogia fidei","Prima scriptura","Lectio divina"]', 'Analogia fidei', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'According to Nehemiah 8:8, what did the Levites do with the Law?', 'multiple_choice', '["Read it silently","Read and explained it clearly","Changed its meaning","Hid it from the people"]', 'Read and explained it clearly', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'What is lexical analysis?', 'multiple_choice', '["Studying sentence structure","Word studies","Analyzing literary genre","Comparing translations"]', 'Word studies', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'In Acts 8:30-35, what did Philip do for the Ethiopian?', 'multiple_choice', '["Baptized him immediately","Interpreted Isaiah for him","Gave him a scroll","Sent him away"]', 'Interpreted Isaiah for him', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'What does literary context emphasize?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring surrounding passages","Interpreting passages in light of immediate and broader context","Reading verses in isolation","Modern applications only"]', 'Interpreting passages in light of immediate and broader context', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'What does the grammatical-historical method prioritize while recognizing figurative language?', 'multiple_choice', '["Allegorical sense","Mystical sense","Literal sense","Moral sense"]', 'Literal sense', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'What resources help with historical-cultural background study?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only personal opinions","Bible dictionaries, commentaries, and background studies","Modern novels","Internet blogs"]', 'Bible dictionaries, commentaries, and background studies', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750007, 'Describe the steps you would take to apply the grammatical-historical method to a specific Bible passage.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());
